definitions: There is no point or benefit in doing something.
Doing something will not achieve the desired result.
examples: It is no use crying over spilled milk.
It is no use trying to fix it now; it's too late.
It is no use arguing with him; he never listens.
lemma: it is no use doing sth
synonyms: there's no point in doing sth
source: it is no use doing sth
